name: Don Warren
bio: Don Warren serves as the Mayor of Tyler, the largest city in East Texas and the county seat of Smith County. The mayor presides over city council meetings and serves as the ceremonial head of the city. Tyler operates under a council-manager form of government.
campaignPromises: Support responsible growth and economic development in Tyler
Improve city infrastructure including roads and utilities
Maintain public safety as the city grows
Promote Tyler as a destination for business and tourism
